creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
mutt-devel doesnt' build in presence of OpenSSL from ports. Likely library from system openssl is used with includes from ports one or vice versa.

Build log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/mutt-devel-1.5.21_1.log

Port maintainer (udo.schweigert@siemens.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

How-To-Repeat: Build in presence of security/openssl
